items.title: Read CODEX, cad_iteration docs, and current work log/checklist conventions before changes
items.notes: Loaded CODEX.md, docs/cad_iteration/INDEX.md, SYSTEM_RECORD intent, and prior work log/checklist patterns.

items.title: Run broader sampled L1/L2 benchmark as the main real generalization baseline
items.notes: Started benchmark/runs/20260413_093734 with the full sampled 10-per-level L1/L2 set on kimi-k2.5-thinking. Added focused axisymmetric/generalization rerun benchmark/runs/20260413_121231 for L1_40,L1_79,L1_191,L2_88,L2_192 after landing local band grounding + procedural-clause demotion.

items.title: Run non-benchmark external text probes to test unseen prompt generalization
items.notes: Started test_runs/20260413_094501 and test_runs/20260413_094502 from benchmark/corpus/external_cadquery_index.json prompts.

items.title: Cluster failures by shared runtime or validation gap instead of by individual case
items.notes: Current shared clusters: (1) Build123d guessed API surfaces on unknown prompts (`Box(..., depth=...)`, bare `shell(...)`, bare helper usage) from test_runs/20260413_094502; (2) validator false contradiction on local pattern dimensions vs whole-body bbox from test_runs/20260413_095100 and benchmark L1_101 artifacts; (3) explicit-anchor hole cases on centered hosts needed detached-solid rejection plus corner-frame -> centered-frame coordinate recovery instead of case-specific countersink hacks; (4) axisymmetric/tutorial-style prompts could leave geometry-correct runs incomplete because process/setup clauses (`units`, `default XY plane`, `half-sectional view`, `revolve`, `after closing profile`) were treated as unresolved coverage instead of non-blocking narration; (5) Build123d directional-drilling / half-shell prompts were still guessing workplane-origin and semi-profile APIs (`Plane.rotated(..., (0,0,0))`, `Circle(..., arc_size=...)`, `Semicircle(...)`) instead of using plane-normal translation and same-builder cylinder/intersect recipes; (6) named-plane section requirements with mixed nested profiles can still drift into default-centered primitive shortcuts (`Cylinder(...)`) unless the plane-anchored positive-span contract is stated more explicitly; (7) annular-groove repairs can still guess a non-existent `Ring(...)` helper unless the annular-band recipe is made explicit.

items.title: Implement only generic fixes that can improve multiple cases or families
items.notes: Landed shared preflight lint for `Box(..., depth=...)` and bare `shell(...)`, synced prompt/skill/docs, fixed validation clause grounding so local pattern-layout dimensions reuse direct feature evidence instead of whole-body bbox, tightened host-face scoping so detached solids cannot satisfy plate-hole validation, exposed normalized local centers / corner-frame translations through query_feature_probes for explicit-anchor hole families, added axisymmetric cylindrical-band grounding for stepped/profile-point/plane-anchored disk clauses plus symmetric-extrude grounding, demoted tutorial-style process/setup revolve narration to non-blocking `process_setup` clauses, and added new Build123d contract guards for plane-normal offset semantics, `Plane.rotated(..., (0,0,0))` origin guesses, `Circle(..., arc_size=...)`, `Semicircle(...)`, `Ring(...)`, AST-based countersink keyword validation, plus missing-helper guards for `Workplanes(...)` and lowercase `hole(...)`.

items.title: Update CODEX-adjacent docs and cad_iteration records if runtime behavior changes
items.notes: Updated docs/cad_iteration/TOOL_SURFACE.md, ITERATION_PROTOCOL.md, SYSTEM_RECORD.json (now v3.1.18), and today's work log with the new preflight, axisymmetric grounding, symmetric-extrude grounding, process/setup-clause demotion, workplane-normal offset, plane-rotation-origin, and semi-profile Build123d contracts.

items.title: Re-run focused tests, at least one real probe, and broad benchmark evidence before claiming improvement
items.notes: Latest focused verification passed on PATH="/opt/homebrew/bin:$PATH" uv run pytest -q tests/unit/sub_agent_runtime/test_codegen_prompt_contract.py tests/unit/sub_agent_runtime/test_skill_pack.py tests/unit/sub_agent_runtime/test_tool_runtime_preflight_lint.py -> 74 passed. Fresh benchmark anchor benchmark/runs/20260413_170725/L1_218 now converges in 1 round. Fresh L2 slices showed: benchmark/runs/20260413_171432/L2_130 still fails evaluator despite validator pass; benchmark/runs/20260413_172650 and 20260413_173129/L2_172 confirmed the countersink false-positive lint is gone and exposed the next real API hallucinations (`Workplanes(...)`, lowercase `hole(...)`). A new rerun benchmark/runs/20260413_173403/L2_172 is in progress with those missing-helper guards added.

items.title: Create a small Build123d demo and reporting package for migration-stage presentation
items.notes: Added demos/build123d_foundations with local-frame countersink, half-shell directional drilling, and shelled body/lid demos; generated STEP artifacts under demos/build123d_foundations/artifacts; added report-20260413-build123d-experiments plus docs/work_logs/2026-04-13_build123d迁移实验与演示说明.md.

items.title: Rename repository identity from build123 to build123d and publish the latest migration experiment state
items.notes: Updated pyproject package name, README, RUNBOOK paths, and report/demo references. Remote/API rename, local directory rename, commit, and push remain to be finalized.
